label: 🎯 Importuj wojska
url: javascript:(function(){var t=document.querySelector('table#units_table'); if(!t){t=document.querySelector('#units_table');} if(t){ try{var payload=btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(t.outerHTML))); var w=window.open('https://twdatabase.online/Wedges/My','_blank'); try{w.name='twd_troops:'+payload;}catch(e){} }catch(e){alert('Błąd kodowania');}} else alert('Nie znaleziono tabeli jednostek.');})();
style: background: none !important; border: none !important; box-shadow: none !important; padding: 0 !important; margin-left: 5px; cursor: pointer; display: inline-block; vertical-align: middle;
